titleStmt.title: SII 22.247: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 247. (A.R. No. of 247 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, CHEYYAR TALUK, TIRUPPANAṄGĀḌU. ŚIVA TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL.

summary.p: This seems to state that some lands situated in Vaṉpākkam, Śaḍaippaḷḷi and Tiruppaṉaṅgāḍu villages which constituted a unit known as Tirukkaṇṇappaviḷāgam were granted for offerings to god Vadakkil-uḍaiya-Nāyanār (Kṛpānātha) in the temple at Śiṟupanaṅgāḍu by the Vēṭṭai-Vichchādirar for the merit of Śambuvarayar (chief ?). The imprecation at the end implies that they claim to belong to the hunter clan of Tirukkaṇṇappar.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . Uṭaiyār tiruppaṉaṅkāṭuṭaiyār tevatāṉam vaṉpākkamum vaṭakaḻaṉi caṭaipaḷḷiyum tiruppaṉaṅkāṭāṉa Uḷḷūrum tiruvellaiyum śrīkoyilu mā
ṉa tirukkaṇṇappaviḷākamuñ ciṟupanaṅkāṭṭil vaṭakkiluṭaiya nāya ṉārkku tiruvamutupaṭi celuttuvatākac cammatittu campuvarāyakaḷukku naṉṟāka
viṭṭom veṭṭai viccātirarom Itukkaḻivu colluvār veṭṭaik kāṟarum tirukkaṇṇappavaṅcamumallātār Itu paṉmāhesararakṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.247 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
